node_check._comment_gid_index: GID index to check on all RDMA interfaces. Typically '3' for RoCE (RDMA over Converged Ethernet). Must be a valid GID index for your InfiniBand/RoCE setup.
node_check._comment_expected_rocm_version: Expected ROCm version across all cluster nodes. Must match the output of 'amd-smi version' on all nodes. Format: 'major.minor.patch' (e.g., '6.2.0', '5.7.1').
node_check._comment_rdma_interfaces: List of specific RDMA interface names that should be present on all cluster nodes. Examples: ['rocep28s0', 'rocep62s0'] for standard setup, ['mlx5_0', 'mlx5_1'] for Mellanox, ['ib0', 'ib1'] for generic InfiniBand.

rdma._comment: RDMA connectivity testing parameters using ibv_rc_pingpong (direct IB verbs) for RCCL-compatible testing
rdma._comment_connectivity_mode: RDMA connectivity testing mode. Options: 'basic' (test adjacent node pairs, fast, ~14% coverage for 8 nodes), 'full_mesh' (test all possible node pairs, comprehensive, 100% coverage), 'skip' (skip RDMA connectivity testing entirely).
rdma._comment_nodes_per_full_mesh_group: Number of nodes in each full-mesh partition group for parallel RDMA testing (2-128). Smaller groups use fewer resources per node but require more rounds. Adjust based on cluster size and resource constraints.
rdma._comment_ibv_test_timeout: Timeout in seconds for each ibv_rc_pingpong connectivity test. Uses ibv_rc_pingpong (direct IB verbs) instead of rping for RCCL-compatible testing. Increase for slower networks or high-latency connections.
rdma._comment_ibv_test_port_range: Port range for ibv_rc_pingpong tests to avoid conflicts. Format: 'start-end' (e.g., '10000-50000', '10000-10999'). Ensure ports are not blocked by firewalls.
rdma._comment_inter_full_mesh_group_pairs_per: Max ordered full-mesh group-pairs (Gi→Gj keys) per wave during inter-group RDMA testing. 'auto' calculates as max(1, num_groups - 1). Can be set to a specific integer to control wave size and reduce memory/CPU load.
rdma._comment_prune_failure_threshold: Prune nodes whose fraction of peers with ≥1 FAIL intra test is ≥ this value. Range: 0.0 to 1.0 (0.5 = 50% failure threshold). Helps remove problematic nodes before inter-group testing. Lower values (0.2-0.3) are more aggressive.
rdma._comment_port_retry_max: Max retry attempts for pairs whose logs show PORT_LISTEN_FAILED. Range: 0-10 retries with new TCP ports after each wave. Helps handle port conflicts during large-scale testing.
rdma._comment_port_retry_gap: Port gap when remapping ports for PORT_LISTEN_FAILED retries. Range: 1-65535. Starts at (max port in batch) + this gap to reduce overlap with ephemeral ports.
rdma._comment_exclude_failed_interface_nodes: Legacy hint for reporting: preflight now prunes interface/GID-failed nodes from the SSH host list automatically. Interface failures are excluded from mesh testing regardless of this flag.

ifoe._comment: IFoE L2 connectivity testing via 'afmctl test ping' (AIMVT-180). Opt-in: defaults to 'skip'.
ifoe._comment_connectivity_mode: IFoE L2 ping mode. Options: 'run' (execute afmctl L2 ping on every reachable node) or 'skip' (default; preflight will not invoke afmctl). Enable once afmctl and the IFoE driver are available on every node.
ifoe._comment_afmctl_path: Absolute path or PATH-resolved name of the afmctl binary on each cluster node. Examples: 'afmctl', '/usr/local/bin/afmctl'.
ifoe._comment_use_sudo: When true, afmctl is invoked with sudo. Enable if afmctl needs root on the cluster image.
ifoe._comment_bdf_discovery: How to determine which accelerator BDFs to ping on each node. 'auto' runs 'afmctl show device' on each node and uses the BDFs reported there. 'config' uses only the explicit 'bdfs' list below.
ifoe._comment_bdfs: Optional explicit list of accelerator BDFs (e.g. ['0001:01:00.1']) shared across the cluster. Leave empty to defer to bdf_discovery='auto'.
ifoe._comment_dst_accelerators: Destination accelerator IDs passed to --dst-accelerator. One afmctl ping is issued per (bdf, dst_accelerator). Use [0] for a single-accelerator destination; use a list like [0, 1] to ping multiple peers.
ifoe._comment_ports: Ports passed to -p. Use 'all' (default; omits -p so afmctl tests every port), a string like '0,1,2' or '0-7', or a list [0,1,2].
ifoe._comment_pings_per_port: Value for -c (pings per port pair). Larger values smooth over transient losses.
ifoe._comment_per_ping_timeout: Optional value for afmctl's -t flag (per-ping timeout). Leave null to use afmctl's default.
ifoe._comment_traffic_types: Traffic categories to enforce when evaluating PASS/FAIL. Maps to afmctl's --traffic-type (request, response, non-ifoe). When all three are selected (default) --traffic-type is omitted so afmctl exercises every category.
ifoe._comment_loss_threshold_pct: Maximum tolerated packet loss percentage per traffic type. Defaults to 0.0 (any failure marks the node as FAIL).
ifoe._comment_ssh_timeout: Overall SSH timeout (seconds) for each afmctl invocation. Increase for large port counts or high pings_per_port values.

node_smoke._comment: Primus node_smoke checks via primus-cli direct (opt-in; default skip). See Primus docs/node-smoke-test-instruction.md
node_smoke._setup_comment: Primus clone/venv setup runs automatically when auto_setup is true (default). Manual equivalent:
node_smoke._setup_step_3: python3 -m venv /home/{user-id}/envs/preflight/.venv && pip install torch --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/rocm6.2
node_smoke._setup_note: Paths use {user-id} resolved at runtime. Set auto_setup to false to skip automatic install.
node_smoke._comment_auto_setup: When true, clone/update Primus and create venv with minimal deps (torch) on each node before node_smoke.
node_smoke._comment_setup_timeout: SSH timeout (seconds) for the per-node Primus auto_setup step (clone + pip install).
node_smoke._comment_force_reclone: When true, rm -rf primus_dir and clone fresh on every run (destructive). With shared_install (default), only the leader node reclones.
node_smoke._comment_shared_install: When true (default), only the first node clones/updates Primus and installs the venv on shared NFS home; other nodes wait. Set false only if primus_dir and venv_activate are local per node.
node_smoke._comment_pip_install_mode: Venv deps after clone: 'minimal' (torch only), 'requirements' (pip install -r requirements.txt), or 'skip' (venv only).
node_smoke._comment_torch_pip_index_url: PyTorch wheel index for minimal install. Match your ROCm version (e.g. rocm6.2, rocm7.1).
node_smoke._comment_primus_git_url: Primus repository URL for one-time clone.
node_smoke._comment_primus_git_branch: Git branch to checkout after clone. node_smoke and primus-cli direct preflight live on this branch.
node_smoke._comment_primus_git_recurse_submodules: Clone submodules (Megatron, etc.). false is recommended for node_smoke — submodules are not required and slow setup.
node_smoke._comment_primus_dir: Path where Primus is cloned on each cluster node. Must match the clone target in setup step 1. Required when connectivity_mode is 'run'.
node_smoke._comment_venv_activate: Path to the Python virtualenv activate script used by primus-cli direct. Required when connectivity_mode is 'run'.
node_smoke._comment_gpus_per_node: Expected GPU count per node (exported as GPUS_PER_NODE and passed to node_smoke --expected-gpus).
node_smoke._comment_master_port: MASTER_PORT for the distributed env primus-cli sets up across SSH-launched ranks.
node_smoke._comment_dump_path: Directory for per-node smoke/*.json output. Leave empty to use <reporting.artifacts_root_dir>/node_smoke.
node_smoke._comment_expected_rdma_nics: Hard-fail when training RDMA NIC count differs. null defaults to len(node_check.rdma_interfaces). Example: 8.
node_smoke._comment_ulimit_l_min_gb: FAIL when RLIMIT_MEMLOCK is below this many GiB. 0 disables.
node_smoke._comment_shm_min_gb: FAIL when /dev/shm is below this many GiB. 0 disables.
node_smoke._comment_skip_dmesg: Skip the dmesg recent-error scan (use inside unprivileged containers).
node_smoke._comment_allow_foreign_procs: Do not FAIL on foreign GPU processes. Recommended inside containers where proc names resolve to N/A.
node_smoke._comment_allowed_procs: Comma-separated process names allowed to hold GPUs without failing the node.
node_smoke._comment_require_tools: Comma-separated tools that must exist in PATH for PASS (amd-smi, rocm-smi, lsof). Empty = warn only.
node_smoke._comment_nccl_socket_ifname: Optional NCCL_SOCKET_IFNAME / GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME override for node_smoke.
node_smoke._comment_gloo_socket_ifname: Optional GLOO_SOCKET_IFNAME override (defaults to nccl_socket_ifname when empty).
node_smoke._comment_nccl_ib_hca: Optional NCCL_IB_HCA override. Defaults to comma-joined node_check.rdma_interfaces.
node_smoke._comment_nccl_ib_gid_index: Optional NCCL_IB_GID_INDEX override. Defaults to node_check.gid_index.
node_smoke._comment_ssh_timeout: SSH timeout in seconds for each node's node_smoke invocation (~30s; increase for slow nodes).
node_smoke._comment_extra_args: Additional node_smoke CLI flags forwarded to primus-cli. Example: ["--no-clean-dump-path"].

reporting._comment_generate_html_report: Whether to generate detailed HTML report. Set to 'false' to disable HTML report generation.
reporting._comment_artifacts_root_dir: Root directory for preflight artifacts. HTML reports are saved here, and RDMA full_mesh ScriptLet logs use <artifacts_root_dir>/rdma_connectivity_workspace/<session>/<round>/ on each node (NFS-friendly). Must be writable by the user running the tests.
reporting._comment_generate_rdma_pairs_csv: Whether to generate CSV file with failed RDMA pairs alongside HTML report. Set to 'false' to disable CSV generation. Useful for analyzing connectivity patterns and failures.

debug._comment_scriptlet: Enable ScriptLet debug mode: preserve generated scripts/logs on remote nodes. For RDMA connectivity, wraps each ibv_rc_pingpong server in strace with per-test traces under /tmp/preflight/strace_server_<iface>_<port>.log. WARNING: Can be expensive at scale due to strace overhead.
